evaluators.name: One-time Featured Program Donation (Most Children Fed per $10) Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user made a one-time credit/debit card donation between $40–$50, covering fees, to the featured program that feeds the most children per $10.

evaluators.name: Monthly Country Donation (Highest Child Malnutrition Rate) Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user set up a $20–$30 monthly credit/debit card donation with SMS opt-in on the 15th to the country with the highest child malnutrition rate.

evaluators.name: Earliest High-Need Saturday Meal-Packing Volunteer Shift Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered one adult (and no youth) for the earliest high-need Saturday meal-packing shift next month within 20 miles of ZIP 94103.

evaluators.name: Longest-Waiting Central America Child Sponsorship Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user started a roughly $40/month sponsorship for the longest-waiting child aged 6–10 in Central America.

evaluators.name: Earliest Chicago June Family 5K Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered one adult and one child for the earliest Chicago family 5K run/walk event in June, choosing that event’s earliest start time.

evaluators.name: Summer Meals Personal Fundraising Page Creation Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a personal page in an active Summer Meals peer-to-peer campaign with a $400–$600 goal, custom title and URL, ≥40-word story, and then copied the share link.

evaluators.name: African School Meal Program Info Kit Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user requested an info kit by both postal mail and email for an African school meal program serving at least 50,000 children, providing all required contact fields.

evaluators.name: School Breakfast Funding Advocacy Letter Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user sent an advocacy letter on increasing school breakfast funding to all representatives for ZIP 10001, with ≥20 custom words and both email and print-ready PDF selected.
